title: dryopteris varia subsp. saxifraga
intro: Dryopteris varia subsp. saxifraga, commonly known as the saxifrage wood fern, is a subspecies of fern in the Dryopteris genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate various health issues. The medicinal properties of saxifrage wood fern include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and support liver health, making it a valuable asset in herbal remedies. Saxifrage wood fern can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal benefits, and it is also used in some traditional herbal remedies to promote digestion and boost the immune system.
